body.title: Book ch4: add /debug autonomous skill description
body.result: Added /debug skill section to Chapter 4 — escalation ladder, report format, report-first principle
body.description:
Update lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/5.Skills.md (Chapter 4) to add /debug as an autonomous mixed-mode skill. Describe: pointer resolution input pattern, Scraps→Haiku→Sonnet escalation ladder, structured report format (SUMMARY/WHERE/WHAT/STATE/LOG WINDOW/HYPOTHESIS/NEXT), and the report-first principle — CC reads a report rather than investigating interactively. This is the compiled inference ladder applied to debugging.

**Affected files:** lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/5.Skills.md
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** one new skill section (/debug); update version timestamp to current MT
**Test plan:** read file and verify /debug section present with escalation ladder and report format; version stamp updated
